texto: I've been a medical and public health professional as well as a mother. I became skilled at juggling a number of priorities and competing interests. Like many other female leaders, I've tried to serve as a role model for the young women at my organization who are trying to balance a high-level leadership position and a family.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Margaret Hamburg: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a familia. O trecho “I've been a medical and public health professional as well as a mother. I became skilled at juggl…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que familia, family, women pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de women e health.

texto: At FDA, our mission is to promote and protect the health of the public. As commissioner, I've worked hard to galvanize people around that idea. I want employees to be thinking about the unique and essential contribution they are making to our mission.
